commands.OBJMASK: Creates wipeout objects behind selected text, MText, tables, or polylines to mask the background.
commands.VPFROMREG: Creates a viewport in paperspace from a selected region in modelspace, with automatic scaling options.
commands.LAYRED: Sets selected layer, region entities, or XREF-related layers to red based on the chosen mode.
commands.LAYGREEN: Sets all layers belonging to a selected XREF to green.
commands.AREALABEL: Calculates the area of selected closed polylines and places square-foot labels at their centers.
commands.ADDNOTE: Adds a note from the Project Management app Notes tab to an existing or new MText object.
commands.PROJECTCHECKLIST: Opens a project-scoped checklist palette using checklist definitions from the desktop app and shared completion state for the current project.
commands.SETPANELLOCATION: Stores a panel location in the current drawing for electrical drafting commands.
commands.SETSCALE: Stores the current drawing scale for newly created electrical symbols and annotations.
commands.SETPANELNAME: Stores the panel name used by electrical drafting commands.
commands.HOMERUN: Creates a scaled three-vertex Leader and panel-name MText using an interactive four-point workflow.
commands.HRSETTINGS: Opens a modeless palette for panel location, drawing scale, panel name, and home-run layer settings.
